name: Queen Ogden Headboard Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Give your sleeping nook a stylish makeover with this Queen Ogden Headboard from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This queen-size wooden headboard features a sectional design for textural flair. Perfect for offering you a comfortable backrest when relaxing, reading or watching TV in bed, it showcases a natural wooden finish to add rustic flair to your bedroom decor.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
